scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl uppercase tracking-tighter font-black

layout.spacing: Generous (p-8 to p-24) within sections, combined with strict visible grid borders.
layout.border_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look) - Use visible border-r and border-b in dark mode (border-zinc-800) to create a blueprint/schematic feel suitable for heavy machinery.
layout.bento_grid: Used for product categories. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6.

navigation.classes: fixed w-full top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-b border-zinc-800

about_section.layout: Asymmetrical grid (col-span-5 for text, col-span-7 for images)
features: Statistics counters (Years of Experience, Countries Exported To, etc.)
Marquee of the tagline: 'Daha iyisini hedefledik, en iyisini ürettik'

products_grid.style: Flat cards with 1px border. No soft shadows. Brutalist.
products_grid.hover_effect: border-[#FF6200] and image scale up slightly. -translate-y-1.

quote_form.style: Shadcn Form elements heavily customized. Flat surfaces, square corners or very slight radius (rounded-sm).

hero_slider.description: Red tractor plowing field under sunset - Hero Image 1
Tractor driving through field at sunset - Hero Image 2

about_texture.description: Freshly plowed farmland (Use as low-opacity background texture in About or Stats section)

product_categories.description: Aerial view of tractor - Use for Soil Preparation category
Tractor on brown grass - Use for Harvesters category

animations.micro_interactions: Button hover fills, card border reveals. Avoid bouncy/playful animations. Use sharp, fast easings (e.g. [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]) for an engineered feel.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and #FF6200 orange accent. Do not introduce standard blue or purple colors.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layout, avoiding Shadcn generic layout components, but use Shadcn for Form, Select (language dropdown), and Inputs.
Implement bilingual support (TR/EN) using a React context or simple state dictionary for this MVP.
Apply 'Barlow Condensed' for all H1/H2 headings in uppercase to achieve the heavy industrial look. Install it via Google Fonts.
For the hero section, use the provided sunset tractor images with a heavy bg-black/50 overlay to ensure the white and orange text is perfectly legible.
Use a bento-style asymmetrical grid for the products section, applying a 1px border (#27272A) on cards instead of soft shadows.
Never use placeholder images; rely strictly on the media URLs provided in this JSON.
Include a 'react-fast-marquee' section displaying the bilingual tagline: 'Daha iyisini hedefledik, en iyisini ürettik / We aimed for better, and produced the best'
